name: The Fireside Hearth
description: Cozy indoor seating positioned directly adjacent to our signature stone fireplace. Unwind with warm acoustics, heavy knit blankets, and the rich aroma of freshly ground mountain espresso.

name: The Panoramic Glass Dome
description: Sip your warm brew under the open sky inside a heated glass dome on our mountain terrace. Take in 360-degree views of Kufri's snow-capped peaks and mist-filled valleys.

name: The Pine Canopy Loft
description: An elevated quiet loft constructed from aromatic cedar wood. Nestled among tall mountain pines, it offers high-speed Wi-Fi and power outlets, making it the perfect remote work sanctuary or reading escape.
